title: astragalus teheranicus
intro: Astragalus teheranicus, also known as Iranian astragalus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus teheranicus include reduced inflammation and stress, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus teheranicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
